primary_site.evidence: CT-guided biopsy of left lower lobe mass reveals moderately differentiated adenocarcinoma

cancer_category.evidence: adenocarcinoma with acinar predominant pattern and focal signet ring features. TTF-1 positive, Napsin A positive, CK7 positive

overall_stage_at_diagnosis.evidence: Stage IIIB unresectable EGFR exon 19 deletion-positive adenocarcinoma with chest wall invasion and N2 disease

t_stage_at_diagnosis.evidence: 4.5 cm left lower lobe mass abutting and invading the posterolateral chest wall with rib erosion

n_stage_at_diagnosis.evidence: chest wall invasion and N2 disease. Ipsilateral mediastinal lymphadenopathy at stations 5 and 7 (largest 2.3 cm)

m_stage_at_diagnosis.evidence: No distant FDG-avid disease. MRI brain negative for intracranial metastases.

histology.value: moderately differentiated adenocarcinoma, acinar predominant with focal signet ring features
histology.evidence: moderately differentiated adenocarcinoma with acinar predominant pattern and focal signet ring features

diagnosis_date.evidence: No specific diagnosis date mentioned in the clinical notes

biomarker_egfr_exon19del.evidence: EGFR exon 19 deletion (p.L747_T751del) detected at VAF 44%

regimen_1_drug_list.evidence: Plan: Concurrent chemoradiation per standard of care followed by consolidation osimertinib

regimen_1_start_date.evidence: No specific start date for chemoradiation mentioned

regimen_1_end_date.evidence: No specific end date for chemoradiation mentioned

regimen_1_toxicity_list.evidence: Patchy ground-glass opacities in left lower lobe consistent with radiation pneumonitis. Radiation pneumonitis improving on steroid taper.

regimen_2_drug_list.evidence: Plan: Start consolidation osimertinib once steroid dose is below prednisone 10 mg daily

regimen_2_start_date.evidence: No specific start date for osimertinib consolidation mentioned

regimen_2_end_date.evidence: Osimertinib still ongoing at 12 months surveillance; no end date documented

regimen_2_toxicity_list.evidence: Tolerating treatment well. No osimertinib-specific toxicities documented.

radiation_type.evidence: Concurrent chemoradiation per standard of care. Post-chemoradiation CT shows... radiation pneumonitis

radiation_start_date.evidence: No specific radiation start date mentioned

radiation_end_date.evidence: No specific radiation end date mentioned

radiation_site.evidence: Post-chemoradiation CT shows left lower lobe mass decreased... Mediastinal lymphadenopathy resolved. Patchy ground-glass opacities in left lower lobe consistent with radiation pneumonitis.

burden_1_assessor_type.evidence: Post-chemoradiation CT shows left lower lobe mass decreased from 4.5 cm to 2.2 cm. Mediastinal lymphadenopathy resolved.

burden_1_assessment_date.evidence: No specific date for post-chemoradiation CT mentioned

burden_1_type.evidence: Post-chemoradiation CT shows left lower lobe mass decreased from 4.5 cm to 2.2 cm. Mediastinal lymphadenopathy resolved.

burden_1_detail.value: partial response; mass decreased from 4.5 cm to 2.2 cm (51% reduction); mediastinal lymphadenopathy resolved
burden_1_detail.evidence: Post-chemoradiation CT shows left lower lobe mass decreased from 4.5 cm to 2.2 cm. Mediastinal lymphadenopathy resolved. No distant disease.

burden_2_assessor_type.evidence: CT at 3 months on consolidation osimertinib shows left lower lobe residual 1.8 cm with fibrotic changes.

burden_2_type.evidence: CT at 3 months on consolidation osimertinib shows left lower lobe residual 1.8 cm with fibrotic changes. Pneumonitis opacities resolved.

burden_2_detail.value: continued response; residual mass 1.8 cm (from 2.2 cm); fibrotic changes; pneumonitis resolved
burden_2_detail.evidence: CT at 3 months on consolidation osimertinib shows left lower lobe residual 1.8 cm with fibrotic changes. Pneumonitis opacities resolved.

burden_3_assessor_type.evidence: Stable disease at 9 months on consolidation osimertinib. Pneumonitis resolved. Tolerating treatment well.

burden_3_type.evidence: Stable disease at 9 months on consolidation osimertinib

burden_3_detail.value: stable disease; residual 1.5 cm with fibrosis at 9-12 months
burden_3_detail.evidence: CT at 9 months stable. Left lower lobe residual 1.5 cm. No progression. CT at 12 months stable. Left lower lobe 1.5 cm with fibrosis. No new lesions.

burden_site_primary.evidence: CT shows 4.5 cm left lower lobe mass abutting and invading the posterolateral chest wall with rib erosion

burden_site_mediastinal_nodes.evidence: Ipsilateral mediastinal lymphadenopathy at stations 5 and 7 (largest 2.3 cm). FDG-avid mediastinal nodes (SUV max 9.2).
